tickets.subject: Can't log in
tickets.body: Hi team — I've been trying to log in since this morning and I keep getting 'invalid credentials'. I've reset my password twice. This is blocking my team. Any ideas? — Marcus

tickets.subject: Billing question
tickets.body: Could you explain the $49 line item on my March invoice labelled 'platform uplift'? We weren't expecting that charge.
tickets.suggested_reply: Thanks for reaching out about the March invoice. I understand the unexpected 'platform uplift' charge is concerning, and I’m looking into what that line item covers so we can clarify it for you.
tickets.raw_output: {"urgency":"medium","category":"billing","suggested_reply":"Thanks for reaching out about the March invoice. I understand the unexpected 'platform uplift' charge is concerning, and I’m looking into what that line item covers so we can clarify it for you."}

tickets.subject: Feature request: bulk export
tickets.body: Would love to be able to export the activity log for the whole quarter in a single CSV. Right now I have to click through month-by-month.

tickets.subject: EVERYTHING IS DOWN
tickets.body: our entire checkout flow is returning 500s from your API since 09:12 UTC. we are losing revenue. please escalate.

tickets.subject: Thanks!
tickets.body: Just wanted to say the new dashboard is really well done. My team noticed the p95 latency widget immediately.

tickets.subject: Question about SSO
tickets.body: We're migrating to Okta next month. Does your SAML integration support group-based role mapping, or only user-level assignment?

tickets.subject: Double charge
tickets.body: I was charged twice for last month's subscription. Invoice INV-88123 and INV-88127. Please refund one of them. Also — how did this happen?

tickets.subject: API rate limit on /v1/export
tickets.body: We're hitting 429s on /v1/export even though our usage dashboard says we're at 40% of our monthly quota. Are there per-endpoint caps I'm missing?

tickets.subject: Account locked
tickets.body: I was travelling, tried to sign in from a new laptop, now my account is locked and the 'unlock' email never arrives. I've checked spam. Can someone unlock manually?

tickets.subject: Data export still failing
tickets.body: This is the third ticket on this. Every time I kick off a full org export it gets to ~60% and silently dies — no email, no error on the UI. I have a compliance deadline Friday.

tickets.subject: Feature: dark mode
tickets.body: hey, dark mode when? my eyes.

tickets.subject: Invoice address wrong
tickets.body: Could you update the billing address on our account from the old London office (42 Heddon St) to our new one (8 Marshalsea Rd)? Tax ID unchanged.

tickets.subject: Suspicious login attempt
tickets.body: I got an alert email about a sign-in attempt from an IP in a country I've never been to. I've already rotated my password and enabled 2FA. Can someone confirm whether the attempt actually succeeded, and check the audit log for any data access?

tickets.subject: Price quote for 50 seats
tickets.body: We're scoping a rollout to an additional 50 users on top of our current 20. Can you send over enterprise pricing and whether volume discounts apply above 100 seats?

tickets.subject: Webhook retries
tickets.body: I notice your webhooks retry 3 times with no jitter. On our side a 3-attempt burst overlaps with our primary DB failover window once a week and we lose the event. Could you add configurable retry spacing, or at least surface the dead-letter queue to customers?
